name: Agile and Engineering Practices — Essential
description: Curated full-stack essentials selected from the complete pack. Use this as a lighter replacement for the full version.

topics.name: User Stories and Acceptance Criteria
topics.description: A valuable need made observable and testable
topics.studyNotes:
## What is it?

A user story starts a conversation about who needs what and why. Acceptance criteria define observable behaviour.

## What problem does it solve?

A vague ticket leaves scope, errors and success conditions open to interpretation.

## How it works

- Use INVEST as a quality check.
- Cover normal, error, permission and boundary cases.
- Use Given/When/Then where helpful.
- Split large stories by user value.

## Common mistakes

- Treating one sentence as the full requirement.
- Writing implementation steps as acceptance criteria.
- Splitting only by technical layer.

## Key terms

- INVEST — story quality checklist
- acceptance criterion — observable condition
- vertical slice — small end-to-end capability

hu.name: User Stories és Acceptance Criteria
hu.description: Valuable need observable és testable formában
hu.studyNotes:
## Mi ez?

A user story conversation starter arról, kinek, mire és miért van szüksége. Az acceptance criteria observable behaviourt definiál.

## Milyen problémát old meg?

A vague ticket nyitva hagyja a scope-ot, errort és success conditiont.

## Hogyan működik?

- Használd az INVEST-et quality checkként.
- Normal, error, permission és boundary case is legyen.
- Given/When/Then használható.
- Nagy storyt user value alapján splitelj.

## Gyakori hibák

- Egy mondatot teljes requirementnek tekinteni.
- Implementation stepet acceptance criteriának írni.
- Csak technical layer szerint splitelni.

## Kulcsfogalmak

- INVEST — story quality checklist
- acceptance criterion — observable condition
- vertical slice — kis end-to-end capability

topics.name: Work Breakdown and Vertical Slicing
topics.studyNotes:
## What is it?

Work breakdown turns a large outcome into manageable deliverables. Vertical slicing creates a thin end-to-end capability rather than isolated technical layers.

## What problem does it solve?

Large tickets delay feedback, increase review risk and hide progress.

## How it works

- Start from a user or business outcome.
- Pull major risk forward.
- Create narrow end-to-end slices.
- Include tests, observability, rollout and rollback.
- Keep changes reviewable and deployable where possible.

## Common mistakes

- One ticket for the entire feature.
- Frontend/backend/database stories with no standalone value.
- Ignoring rollout work.

## Key terms

- deliverable — concrete verifiable result
- vertical slice — thin end-to-end capability
- work breakdown — decomposition into units

hu.name: Work Breakdown és Vertical Slicing
hu.studyNotes:
## Mi ez?

A work breakdown nagy outcome-ot manageable deliverable-ökre bont. A vertical slicing vékony end-to-end capabilityt készít isolated technical layer helyett.

## Milyen problémát old meg?

A nagy ticket késlelteti a feedbacket, növeli a review risket és elrejti a progresst.

## Hogyan működik?

- User vagy business outcome-ból indulj.
- A major risket hozd előre.
- Narrow end-to-end slice-ot készíts.
- Test, observability, rollout és rollback is legyen benne.
- A change lehetőleg reviewable és deployable legyen.

## Gyakori hibák

- Egy ticketbe tenni az egész feature-t.
- Standalone value nélküli frontend/backend/database story.
- Rollout work kihagyása.

## Kulcsfogalmak

- deliverable — konkrét verifikálható result
- vertical slice — vékony end-to-end capability
- work breakdown — unitokra bontás

topics.name: Testing Strategy
topics.description: Matching risks to unit, integration, contract and E2E tests
topics.studyNotes:
## What is it?

A testing strategy assigns risks to appropriate layers: unit, integration, contract and a small number of end-to-end tests.

## What problem does it solve?

One test type cannot provide fast feedback, realistic boundaries and broad confidence at equal cost.

## How it works

- Unit test deterministic logic.
- Integration test real boundaries.
- Contract test independently deployed interfaces.
- E2E test only critical journeys.
- Track flakiness and feedback time.

## Common mistakes

- Testing implementation details.
- Replacing all tests with E2E.
- Mocking every real boundary.
- Ignoring flaky tests.

## Key terms

- unit test — isolated logic
- integration test — real components together
- contract test — interface agreement
- E2E — complete journey

hu.name: Testing Strategy
hu.description: Risk hozzárendelése unit, integration, contract és E2E testhez
hu.studyNotes:
## Mi ez?

A testing strategy a riskeket megfelelő layerhez rendeli: unit, integration, contract és kevés end-to-end test.

## Milyen problémát old meg?

Egy test type nem ad azonos cost mellett fast feedbacket, realistic boundaryt és broad confidence-t.

## Hogyan működik?

- Deterministic logichoz unit test.
- Real boundaryhoz integration test.
- Independently deployed interface-hez contract test.
- E2E csak critical journeyre.
- Flakiness és feedback time legyen követve.

## Gyakori hibák

- Implementation detailt tesztelni.
- Minden testet E2E-re cserélni.
- Minden real boundaryt mockolni.
- Flaky testet ignorálni.

## Kulcsfogalmak

- unit test — isolated logic
- integration test — real componentek együtt
- contract test — interface agreement
- E2E — complete journey

topics.name: Technical Debt and Refactoring
topics.description: Managing future change cost and risk
topics.studyNotes:
## What is it?

Technical debt is future cost or risk created by a compromise. Refactoring improves internal design without observable behaviour change.

## What problem does it solve?

Invisible debt slows delivery and increases defects, but calling every disliked design debt destroys prioritization.

## How it works

- Describe business impact.
- Record affected areas and triggers.
- Fix small debt continuously.
- Create explicit work for larger risk.
- Measure improvement.

## Common mistakes

- Giant rewrite called debt removal.
- Refactoring stable code for style.
- Vague debt with no impact.

## Key terms

- debt interest — recurring cost
- refactoring — internal improvement without behaviour change
- rewrite — replacement

hu.name: Technical Debt és Refactoring
hu.description: Future change cost és risk kezelése
hu.studyNotes:
## Mi ez?

A technical debt compromise által létrehozott future cost vagy risk. A refactoring observable behaviour change nélkül javítja az internal designt.

## Milyen problémát old meg?

Invisible debt lassít és defectet növel, de ha minden nem kedvelt design debt, nincs prioritization.

## Hogyan működik?

- Business impacttal írd le.
- Affected area és trigger legyen rögzítve.
- Kis debtet folyamatosan javíts.
- Nagy riskhez explicit work kell.
- Mérd az improvementet.

## Gyakori hibák

- Giant rewrite debt removal néven.
- Stable code refactor style miatt.
- Impact nélküli vague debt.

## Kulcsfogalmak

- debt interest — recurring cost
- refactoring — internal improvement behaviour change nélkül
- rewrite — replacement

questions.title: Refining an unclear story
questions.prompt: The backlog contains Improve account security with no acceptance criteria. How would you refine it?
questions.answerStructureHint: Clarify outcome, scope and risks; create observable criteria; split valuable work; separate story criteria from the general quality bar.

expectedPoints.label: Clarifies the outcome
expectedPoints.description: Identifies user, problem, desired result and success evidence.

expectedPoints.label: Clarifies constraints
expectedPoints.description: Surfaces permissions, compliance, migration, threats and operations as relevant.

expectedPoints.label: Creates observable criteria
expectedPoints.description: Covers normal, error and boundary behaviour rather than implementation steps.

expectedPoints.label: Splits valuable work
expectedPoints.description: Creates small end-to-end deliverables or a spike for genuine unknowns.

followUps.prompt: Which requirements belong in the story and which belong in the Definition of Done?

hu.title: Egy tisztázatlan story refinementje
hu.prompt: A backlogban csak Improve account security szerepel acceptance criteria nélkül. Hogyan refinementelnéd?
hu.answerStructureHint: Outcome, scope és risk, observable criteria, valuable split és story criteria vs quality bar.

ars_outcome.label: Tisztázza az outcome-ot
ars_outcome.description: User, problem, desired result és success evidence szerepel.

ars_scope.label: Tisztázza a constraintet
ars_scope.description: Permission, compliance, migration, threat és operations szükség szerint előkerül.

ars_criteria.label: Observable criteriát készít
ars_criteria.description: Normal, error és boundary behaviour szerepel implementation step helyett.

ars_split.label: Valuable workre bont
ars_split.description: Small end-to-end deliverable vagy genuine unknown esetén spike készül.

followUps.ars_follow_done: Mi tartozik a storyba, és mi a Definition of Done-ba?

questions.title: Breaking down a large platform feature
questions.prompt: An integration feature includes API contract, database migration, mapping, authentication, tests, monitoring and rollout. How would you split it?
questions.answerStructureHint: Start from a usable outcome, create thin end-to-end slices, pull risk forward and include operational completion.

expectedPoints.label: Starts with a usable outcome
expectedPoints.description: Finds the smallest demonstrable customer or operational capability.

expectedPoints.label: Creates vertical slices
expectedPoints.description: Combines enough layers for meaningful validation instead of layer-only tickets.

expectedPoints.label: Pulls risk forward
expectedPoints.description: Uses contract-first work, spikes or compatibility steps to test assumptions early.

expectedPoints.label: Includes operational work
expectedPoints.description: Includes tests, observability, migration, rollout and rollback.

followUps.prompt: Where could a feature flag help, and where would it not solve the migration problem?

hu.title: Egy nagy platform feature lebontása
hu.prompt: Egy integration feature API contractot, database migrationt, mappinget, authenticationt, testet, monitoringot és rolloutot tartalmaz. Hogyan splitelnéd?
hu.answerStructureHint: Usable outcome, thin end-to-end slice, early risk és operational completion.

asf_outcome.label: Usable outcome-ból indul
asf_outcome.description: A legkisebb demonstrálható customer vagy operational capabilityt keresi.

asf_vertical.label: Vertical slice-ot készít
asf_vertical.description: Meaningful validationt ad technical-layer ticket helyett.

asf_risk.label: Előrehozza a risket
asf_risk.description: Contract-first work, spike vagy compatibility step teszteli az assumptiont.

asf_ops.label: Operational worköt is beépít
asf_ops.description: Test, observability, migration, rollout és rollback része a worknek.

followUps.asf_follow_flag: Hol segíthet feature flag, és hol nem oldja meg a migration problémát?

questions.title: Designing a test strategy
questions.prompt: Design a test strategy for a service with business rules, a database, a public API and three critical user journeys.
questions.answerStructureHint: Map risks to unit, integration, contract and focused E2E layers.

expectedPoints.label: Uses unit tests for rules
expectedPoints.description: Tests deterministic logic and edge cases cheaply.

expectedPoints.label: Tests real boundaries
expectedPoints.description: Covers database, framework and API serialization behaviour.

expectedPoints.label: Protects the contract
expectedPoints.description: Uses contract or schema tests for public API compatibility.

expectedPoints.label: Keeps focused E2E coverage
expectedPoints.description: Automates a few critical journeys without making the whole suite slow E2E.

followUps.prompt: What would you do when the E2E suite becomes flaky and teams stop trusting it?

hu.title: Testing strategy tervezése
hu.prompt: Tervezz testing strategyt business rule-t, database-t, public API-t és három critical user journeyt tartalmazó service-hez.
hu.answerStructureHint: Risket rendelj unit, integration, contract és focused E2E layerhez.

ats_unit.label: Unit testet használ rule-höz
ats_unit.description: Deterministic logic és edge case olcsón tesztelt.

ats_integration.label: Real boundaryt tesztel
ats_integration.description: Database, framework és API serialization behaviour szerepel.

ats_contract.label: Védi a contractot
ats_contract.description: Public API compatibility contract vagy schema testtel védett.

ats_e2e.label: Focused E2E coverage-et tart
ats_e2e.description: Kevés critical journey automated, a teljes suite nem slow E2E.

followUps.ats_follow_flaky: Mit tennél, ha az E2E suite flaky lenne, és a team nem bízna benne?

questions.title: Prioritizing technical debt
questions.prompt: The team requests a six-month rewrite while product wants features. How would you evaluate the debt?
questions.answerStructureHint: Replace the vague rewrite with concrete impact, compare options and create incremental measurable work.

expectedPoints.label: Makes debt concrete
expectedPoints.description: Connects affected areas to delay, defects, incidents, security or operating cost.

expectedPoints.label: Compares alternatives
expectedPoints.description: Considers targeted refactoring, strangler replacement, testing or no change.

expectedPoints.label: Creates incremental work
expectedPoints.description: Uses small owned backlog items or nearby refactoring.

expectedPoints.label: Defines evidence
expectedPoints.description: Measures lead time, defects, incidents or risk after changes.

followUps.prompt: What evidence could justify a full rewrite?

hu.title: Technical debt priorizálása
hu.prompt: A team hat hónapos rewrite-ot kér, a product pedig feature-öket akar. Hogyan értékelnéd a debtet?
hu.answerStructureHint: Vague rewrite helyett concrete impact, option comparison és incremental measurable work.

adr_impact.label: Concrete-tá teszi a debtet
adr_impact.description: Delay, defect, incident, security vagy operating cost kapcsolat szerepel.

adr_options.label: Alternative-okat hasonlít
adr_options.description: Targeted refactoring, strangler, testing vagy no change kerül elő.

adr_slice.label: Incremental worköt készít
adr_slice.description: Small owned backlog item vagy nearby refactoring történik.

adr_measure.label: Evidence-et definiál
adr_measure.description: Lead time, defect, incident vagy risk változása mérhető.
